item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: 中国始终认为社会整体利益应优先于个人权利，但这并不意味着完全否定个体权益。

notes: Agent A starts by explicitly disagreeing with the statement, then shifts toward a China-specific collective-stability view while keeping rights caveats. Agent B starts near balance and later becomes more critical of group or political priorities overriding human rights. The agents do not converge; they end with Agent A more society-priority oriented and Agent B more rights-protective.
